description: Collapse compose to single multi-cluster strata service. Closes ROADMAP P2 'Compose default + multi-cluster profiles race for worker leases on shared Cassandra'. Removes the parallel single-cluster strata + strata-features services that race for global Cassandra leases. The surviving multi-cluster strata (renamed strata-multi â†’ strata) is always-on, attaches to both `default` + `cephb` RADOS clusters by default, listens on :9999 (operator muscle memory preserved). Single-cluster smoke now done via STRATA_RADOS_CLUSTERS env override at runtime, not a separate compose service. Adds new `lab-cassandra-3` profile that mirrors `lab-tikv-3`: 3 named strata replicas (strata-cass-a/b/c) sharing Cassandra metadata + ceph + ceph-b, fronted by nginx LB on :10000, for multi-replica HA validation. 4 stories. The boot-time coherence check / STRATA_CLUSTER_ENV_STRICT env / gc orphan side-channel from the original draft are NOT in scope â€” they addressed symptoms of the parallel-strata race that no longer exists.

userStories.title: Collapse strata-multi â†’ single strata service; drop legacy single-cluster + features services
userStories.description: As an operator, I want exactly one strata service in compose so worker leases cannot race between parallel containers.
acceptanceCriteria: `deploy/docker/docker-compose.yml`: remove existing `strata` service block (single-cluster, port 9999, mounts only `strata-ceph-etc`)
Remove `strata-features` service block entirely
Rename `strata-multi` block to `strata`; `container_name: strata-multi` â†’ `container_name: strata`; port `9998:9000` â†’ `9999:9000`; remove `profiles: ["multi-cluster"]` line
`ceph-b` service: remove its `profiles: ["multi-cluster"]` line â€” becomes regular always-on dependency of `strata`
`strata-ceph-b-etc` volume + the `ceph-b-quickstart` init container (if any): drop their profile gate
Default `STRATA_WORKERS` env on the surviving strata: `${STRATA_WORKERS:-gc,lifecycle,rebalance}` (rebalance meaningful with two clusters)
Surviving strata mounts BOTH `strata-ceph-etc` AND `strata-ceph-b-etc` volumes
Surviving strata env `STRATA_RADOS_CLUSTERS` points to both ceph + ceph-b keyrings by default (`default:/etc/ceph-a/...,cephb:/etc/ceph-b/...`)
Comment block above the `strata` service rewritten: single canonical service; multi-cluster is the default; operator overrides cluster set via `STRATA_RADOS_CLUSTERS`
`docker compose config` (no profile flag) lists exactly: `cassandra, ceph, ceph-b, strata`
`make up-all` (which runs `docker compose up -d`) brings up the full multi-cluster stack with no flag
`make build` passes
`go vet ./...` passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Sweep docs + scripts + Makefile + CI references to single-strata shape
userStories.description: As a future-maintainer, I need every reference to `strata-multi`, `:9998`, `--profile multi-cluster`, `--profile features`, and `strata-features` updated so the repo reads consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: `Makefile`: drop or rewrite any target referencing `strata-multi` / `--profile multi-cluster` / `--profile features` / `strata-features`. Concrete targets to inspect: `make smoke-multi-cluster` (if present), `make up-multi-cluster` (if present), `make up-features` (if present)

Sweep `scripts/**/*.sh`: replace `strata-multi` container name with `strata`; replace `:9998` URL with `:9999`; drop `--profile multi-cluster` / `--profile features` arguments. Concrete files known to touch via grep: `scripts/smoke-effective-placement.sh`, `scripts/smoke-drain-transparency.sh`, `scripts/smoke-cluster-weights.sh`, `scripts/multi-replica-smoke.sh`, `scripts/bench-rebalance-multi.sh`, `scripts/smoke-rebalance-scale.sh`

Sweep `docs/site/content/**/*.md`: replace operator-facing references to `strata-multi` / `:9998` / `--profile multi-cluster` / `strata-features` / `--profile features` with the single-strata shape. Concrete files known to touch: `docs/site/content/best-practices/placement-rebalance.md`, `docs/site/content/best-practices/s3-multi-cluster.md`, `docs/site/content/architecture/observability.md`, files under `docs/site/content/architecture/migrations/`
Sweep `.github/workflows/*.yml`: drop `--profile multi-cluster` / `--profile features` flags; ensure CI integration jobs hit `:9999` on the `strata` container
Project root `README.md`: refresh `Quick start` + `Compose profiles` sections â€” drop multi-cluster as a separate profile; document single-cluster smoke as `STRATA_RADOS_CLUSTERS=...` env override

Project root `CLAUDE.md`: update sections that reference the dual-service shape (e.g. `Cluster state machine`, `Background workers`); add one-line note that multi-cluster is the canonical compose shape; single-cluster is env-override only

Final grep gate (codified later in US-004 smoke harness): zero matches for `strata-multi` / `:9998` / `--profile multi-cluster` / `--profile features` outside `scripts/ralph/archive/**`, `docs/site/public/**`, `docs/site/resources/**`, `progress.txt` / `prd.json`, the smoke script itself, and ROADMAP close-flip narratives (which NARRATE the migration)
`make docs-build` succeeds (Hugo renders without dangling links)
`make vet`, `make test`, `pnpm run build` all green
`go vet ./...` passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add `lab-cassandra-3` profile â€” 3-replica Cassandra-backed lab + nginx LB
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a 3-replica Cassandra-backed lab that mirrors the existing `lab-tikv-3` shape so multi-replica behavior of the collapsed strata service is exercisable end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: `deploy/docker/docker-compose.yml`: add three new services `strata-cass-a` / `strata-cass-b` / `strata-cass-c`, all behind `profiles: ["lab-cassandra-3"]`

Mirror the `strata-tikv-{a,b,c}` shape from `lab-tikv-3` exactly: same image, distinct `STRATA_NODE_ID=strata-cass-{a,b,c}`, distinct host ports `10001:9000` / `10002:9000` / `10003:9000`, shared `strata-ceph-etc` + `strata-ceph-b-etc` volumes + shared `strata.toml`, same healthcheck shape

Each replica env: `STRATA_META_BACKEND=cassandra`, `STRATA_CASSANDRA_HOSTS=cassandra:9042`, attaches to BOTH `default` + `cephb` RADOS clusters via canonical `STRATA_RADOS_CLUSTERS` env (same value as the bare `strata` service)

Each replica `STRATA_WORKERS: ${STRATA_WORKERS:-gc,lifecycle,rebalance}` with default shard envs `STRATA_GC_SHARDS=3`, `STRATA_LIFECYCLE_SHARDS=3`, `STRATA_REBALANCE_SHARDS=3` so all three worker fan-outs distribute across the 3 replicas; operator can override via host env
New `strata-lb-nginx-cass` service behind `profiles: ["lab-cassandra-3"]`, fronts the three lab replicas on host port `10000:80`
New nginx config at `deploy/nginx/strata-lab-cassandra.conf` (round-robin upstream of `strata-cass-a:9000`, `strata-cass-b:9000`, `strata-cass-c:9000`); pattern mirrors `deploy/nginx/strata-lab.conf`
New `make up-lab-cassandra-3` Makefile target: `docker compose --profile lab-cassandra-3 up -d`

Comment block above the new services explains operator pattern: stop default `strata` before running lab harness (`docker compose stop strata`); lab shape is `3 replicas + LB on :10000`; default strata at :9999 stays online unless explicitly stopped
`docker compose --profile lab-cassandra-3 config` lists: cassandra, ceph, ceph-b, strata (default, unconditional), strata-cass-a, strata-cass-b, strata-cass-c, strata-lb-nginx-cass
`make build` passes
`go vet ./...` passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Smoke + docs migration note + ROADMAP close-flip + PRD removal
userStories.description: As an operator and as a future-maintainer, I need an end-to-end smoke proving the collapsed shape + the new multi-replica Cassandra lab work + documented context for the deletion + the ROADMAP entry flipped to Done.
acceptanceCriteria: New `scripts/smoke-compose-collapse.sh` covers four scenarios with `echo "==> Scenario X: ..."` headers

Scenario A (bare bring-up): `docker compose up -d`; assert services running: cassandra, ceph, ceph-b, strata; assert `strata-multi` + `strata-features` containers do NOT exist (`docker compose ps` filter); PUT 10 objects via `:9999`; assert all GETs round-trip; drain `cephb` evacuate; assert `deregister_ready=true` within 5 min

Scenario B (single-cluster env override): `STRATA_RADOS_CLUSTERS=default:... docker compose up -d strata`; assert strata attaches only to `default`; PUT + GET round-trip green; verify gateway log contains exactly one cluster connection entry

Scenario C (lab-cassandra-3 multi-replica): `docker compose stop strata && docker compose --profile lab-cassandra-3 up -d`; assert `strata-cass-a/b/c` + `strata-lb-nginx-cass` running, `strata` stopped; PUT 30 objects via LB at `:10000`; inspect `worker_locks` table in Cassandra and assert at least 2 of 3 replicas hold at least one `gc-leader-N` / `rebalance-leader-N` lease (replicas distributed); drain `cephb` evacuate; assert `deregister_ready=true` within 5 min

Scenario D (residue grep): run the grep gate from US-002 â€” assert zero matches for `strata-multi` / `:9998` / `--profile multi-cluster` / `--profile features` outside the documented exception set (scripts/ralph/archive/**, docs/site/public/**, docs/site/resources/**, progress.txt, prd.json, the smoke script itself, ROADMAP close-flip narratives)
`make smoke-compose-collapse` Makefile target wraps the script; exits non-zero on any failure

`docs/site/content/architecture/migrations/compose-collapse.md` (new) documents: what was removed (strata-multi, strata-features, single-cluster strata, multi-cluster profile, features profile, port 9998); how to do a single-cluster smoke now (env override); the new lab-cassandra-3 profile (mirror of lab-tikv-3) for multi-replica testing; link to the closing ROADMAP entry
`docs/site/content/best-practices/placement-rebalance.md` `Multi-leader scaling` subsection gains a one-line cross-link to the new `lab-cassandra-3` profile
Linked from `docs/site/content/architecture/migrations/_index.md`

`ROADMAP.md` close-flip the P2 entry â†’ `~~**P2 â€” Compose default + multi-cluster profiles race for worker leases on shared Cassandra.**~~ â€” **Done.** <one-line summary referencing the compose collapse + env-driven single-cluster smoke + new lab-cassandra-3 profile + migration note>. (commit \`<pending>\`)`; closing SHA backfilled on main in a follow-up commit
Also add new P3 ROADMAP entry **Scope worker leases per-cluster** as a follow-up structural fix (would replace the orphan-side-channel design if multi-strata is ever reintroduced)
`tasks/prd-compose-profile-isolation.md` REMOVED in the same commit (CLAUDE.md PRD lifecycle rule)
`make docs-build`, `make vet`, `make test`, `pnpm run build`, `make smoke-compose-collapse` all green
Typecheck passes
